profile_backing.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1149989 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1149989 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-post-p152-reprofile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(eig_48x48_f64|eigh_48x48_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|pinv_192x192_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|svd_48x48_f64|svd_48x48_full_f64|matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

candidate.description: Kept the existing L21 and L21^T panel materialization so the RHS stream remained contiguous, but replaced prod = matmul_2d(L21, L21^T) plus a separate A22 subtract pass with a Cholesky-local 4x4 register-tiled row microkernel that subtracted each product directly into A22.

proof_test.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1149989 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1149989 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-bsae0-proof cargo test -p fj-lax --lib cholesky -- --nocapture
proof_test.details: 12 tests passed in candidate state, including cholesky_blocked_matches_scalar_and_reconstructs, cholesky_real_fast_path_bit_identical_to_complex_path, NaN/non-square behavior, and triangular_solve_cholesky_roundtrip.

rebench.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=vmi1149989 RCH_WORKERS=vmi1149989 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-bsae0-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(cholesky_1024x1024_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Candidate left small-n scalar Cholesky, diagonal panel factorization, panel solve, strict upper zeroing, and output layout unchanged. The temporary full-Schur microkernel accumulated each product cell over panel columns in ascending t order before subtracting into the same A22 cell.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: N/A: Cholesky has no pivot or comparison tie-breaking surface.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate used separate multiplication and addition in the same per-cell t order, independent SIMD lanes only, no horizontal reduction, no mul_add call, and no mixed precision. Large blocked Cholesky is already tolerance-validated by scalar parity and reconstruction, not bit-identical to the scalar kernel.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: Cholesky consumes no random state.
isomorphism_proof.errors: No public error path changed in candidate state; final production source was restored.

validation.command: RCH fixed-worker cargo test -p fj-lax --lib cholesky -- --nocapture
RCH fixed-worker Criterion target and guard benches
validation.result: candidate regressed Cholesky1024 and was rejected

alien_source.applied_slice: Tried eliminating the full rem x rem product scratch while preserving contiguous L21^T panel reads and full Schur update coverage.
alien_source.outcome: Direct subtracting the product lost to the existing matmul_2d result-buffer path. Do not repeat direct-subtract full Schur variants without a fundamentally different panel/TRSM or factorization structure.

next_primitive.target: Reprofile restored source and pivot to a different primitive family: eig values-only Hessenberg reduction if eig remains material, or a Cholesky panel/TRSM primitive that keeps the existing matmul_2d kernel intact.
next_primitive.target_ratio: >=1.15x on the next fixed-worker top linalg row
next_primitive.reason: Both pass149 lower-only SYRK and pass153 direct-subtract full Schur lost badly; the next pass must stop Schur-subtract loop variants and attack a different algorithmic structure.
proof_obligations: ordering, tie-breaking, floating-point, and RNG isomorphism notes
restore and record rejection if same-worker Criterion does not clear Score>=2.0
